details.reasoning: The implementation successfully meets all core rubric requirements: (1) export_to_onnx function correctly extracts and saves LoRA A and B matrices; (2) accepts output_directory and opset_version (default 17); (3) saves comprehensive metadata including rank, lora_alpha, target_modules in adapter_metadata.json; (4) properly exposed via types.MethodType in patch_saving_functions and exported from save.py; (5) uses ONNX helper libraries (onnx_helper, numpy_helper, onnx.checker) to build and validate graphs; (6) follows unsloth conventions with Apache 2.0 headers, docstrings, type hints, and error handling. Minor deviations: uses manual ONNX graph construction via helpers rather than torch.onnx.export, though this is actually more appropriate for standalone adapter export. The empty PLAN.md file is concerning (suggests plan-mode confusion) but doesn't affect code quality. Overall, a well-structured, production-ready implementation with good error handling and extensive metadata preservation.
